data.content: Implementation complete. Fixed all max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len ESLint warnings across 14 dialog/settings component files. Extracted sub-components: StateDropdown (beat-detail), prepareMetadata helper (beat-metadata-details), BeatOption (merge-beats), useMoveBeat/MoveDialogBody (move-to-project), DispatchModeSelector/MaxClaimsInput (dispatch-section), SwapControlsPanel/AgentSelectItems (dispatch-global-swap), StepPoolEditor sub-components (pools-section), SettingsTabPanels/SettingsTabBar/SettingsFooter (settings-sheet), DefaultProfileSection/ScopeRefinementSection/ResetAuditSection (defaults-section), settings-agents split into 4 files (section/scanned/forms/hooks), useBeatForm/ProfileSelectField/BeatFormActions (beat-form), useCreateBeatQueries/useSubmitBeat (create-beat-dialog). All quality gates pass: lint clean, typecheck clean, 2239 tests passing, build succeeds. 9 commits pushed to origin/main.
